# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

class AdminDashboard
{
    private PDO $pdo;

    public function __construct(string $host, string $dbname, string $username, string $password)
    {
        $dsn = "mysql:host={$host};dbname={$dbname};charset=utf8mb4";
        $this->pdo = new PDO($dsn, $username, $password, [
            PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
            PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
            PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
        ]);
    }

    public function getPdo(): PDO
    {
        return $this->pdo;
    }

    /**
     * Generate a report based on user-selected filters from $_POST.
     *
     * Supported filters:
     *  - date_from (string, Y-m-d)
     *  - date_to (string, Y-m-d)
     *  - status (string or array of strings)
     *  - category (string or array of strings)
     *  - search (string, keyword search on title/description)
     *  - sort_by (string, column name)
     *  - sort_order (string, ASC or DESC)
     *  - page (int)
     *  - per_page (int)
     *  - report_type (string: summary, detailed, category_breakdown, status_breakdown)
     */
    public function generateReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $filters = $this->sanitizeFilters($filters);

        $reportType = $filters['report_type'] ?? 'detailed';

        switch ($reportType) {
            case 'summary':
                return $this->generateSummaryReport($filters);
            case 'category_breakdown':
                return $this->generateCategoryBreakdownReport($filters);
            case 'status_breakdown':
                return $this->generateStatusBreakdownReport($filters);
            case 'detailed':
            default:
                return $this->generateDetailedReport($filters);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize and validate incoming filters.
     */
    private function sanitizeFilters(array $filters): array
    {
        $sanitized = [];

        // Date range
        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $date = \DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $filters['date_from']);
            if ($date && $date->format('Y-m-d') === $filters['date_from']) {
                $sanitized['date_from'] = $filters['date_from'];
            }
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $date = \DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $filters['date_to']);
            if ($date && $date->format('Y-m-d') === $filters['date_to']) {
                $sanitized['date_to'] = $filters['date_to'];
            }
        }

        // Status (can be string or array)
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            if (is_array($filters['status'])) {
                $sanitized['status'] = array_map('trim', array_filter($filters['status']));
            } else {
                $sanitized['status'] = [trim($filters['status'])];
            }
            // Whitelist allowed statuses
            $allowedStatuses = ['active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'archived'];
            $sanitized['status'] = array_intersect($sanitized['status'], $allowedStatuses);
            if (empty($sanitized['status'])) {
                unset($sanitized['status']);
            }
        }

        // Category (can be string or array)
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
                $sanitized['category'] = array_map('trim', array_filter($filters['category']));
            } else {
                $sanitized['category'] = [trim($filters['category'])];
            }
            // Filter out empty values
            $sanitized['category'] = array_filter($sanitized['category'], fn($v) => $v !== '');
            if (empty($sanitized['category'])) {
                unset($sanitized['category']);
            }
        }

        // Search keyword
        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $sanitized['search'] = trim($filters['search']);
        }

        // Sorting
        $allowedSortColumns = ['id', 'title', 'status', 'category', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'amount', 'quantity'];
        if (!empty($filters['sort_by']) && in_array($filters['sort_by'], $allowedSortColumns, true)) {
            $sanitized['sort_by'] = $filters['sort_by'];
        }

        $sanitized['sort_order'] = 'DESC';
        if (!empty($filters['sort_order']) && strtoupper($filters['sort_order']) === 'ASC') {
            $sanitized['sort_order'] = 'ASC';
        }

        // Pagination
        $sanitized['page'] = max(1, (int)($filters['page'] ?? 1));
        $sanitized['per_page'] = max(1, min(500, (int)($filters['per_page'] ?? 25)));

        // Report type
        $allowedReportTypes = ['summary', 'detailed', 'category_breakdown', 'status_breakdown'];
        if (!empty($filters['report_type']) && in_array($filters['report_type'], $allowedReportTypes, true)) {
            $sanitized['report_type'] = $filters['report_type'];
        } else {
            $sanitized['report_type'] = 'detailed';
        }

        return $sanitized;
    }

    /**
     * Build WHERE clause and parameters from filters.
     */
    private function buildWhereClause(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        // Date range
        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'r.created_at >= :date_from';
            $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $conditions[] = 'r.created_at <= :date_to';
            $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
        }

        // Status (IN clause with named placeholders)
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $i => $status) {
                $key = ":status_{$i}";
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = 'r.status IN (' . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ')';
        }

        // Category (IN clause with named placeholders)
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $i => $category) {
                $key = ":category_{$i}";
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $category;
            }
            $conditions[] = 'r.category IN (' . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ')';
        }

        // Search keyword
        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $conditions[] = '(r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)';
            $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
        }

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        return [$whereClause, $params];
    }

    /**
     * Detailed report: paginated list of records with all columns.
     */
    private function generateDetailedReport(array $filters): array
    {
        [$whereClause, $params] = $this->buildWhereClause($filters);

        $sortBy = $filters['sort_by'] ?? 'created_at';
        $sortOrder = $filters['sort_order'];
        $perPage = $filters['per_page'];
        $offset = ($filters['page'] - 1) * $perPage;

        // Count total records
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM reports r {$whereClause}";
        $countStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($countSql);
        $countStmt->execute($params);
        $totalRecords = (int)$countStmt->fetchColumn();

        // Fetch paginated records
        $sql = "SELECT 
                    r.id,
                    r.title,
                    r.description,
                    r.status,
                    r.category,
                    r.amount,
                    r.quantity,
                    r.created_at,
                    r.updated_at
                FROM reports r
                {$whereClause}
                ORDER BY r.{$sortBy} {$sortOrder}
                LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);

        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
        }
        $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $perPage, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);

        $stmt->execute();
        $records = $stmt->fetchAll();

        $totalPages = (int)ceil($totalRecords / $perPage);

        return [
            'report_type' => 'detailed',
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
            'pagination' => [
                'current_page' => $filters['page'],
                'per_page' => $perPage,
                'total_records' => $totalRecords,
                'total_pages' => $totalPages,
                'has_previous' => $filters['page'] > 1,
                'has_next' => $filters['page'] < $totalPages,
            ],
            'data' => $records,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Summary report: aggregate totals.
     */
    private function generateSummaryReport(array $filters): array
    {
        [$whereClause, $params] = $this->buildWhereClause($filters);

        $sql = "SELECT 
                    COUNT(*) AS total_records,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                    COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
                    COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
                    COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity,
                    COALESCE(AVG(r.quantity), 0) AS avg_quantity,
                    MIN(r.created_at) AS earliest_record,
                    MAX(r.created_at) AS latest_record,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT r.category) AS unique_categories,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT r.status) AS unique_statuses
                FROM reports r
                {$whereClause}";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute($params);
        $summary = $stmt->fetch();

        // Also get daily trend data
        $trendSql = "SELECT 
                        DATE(r.created_at) AS report_date,
                        COUNT(*) AS daily_count,
                        COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS daily_amount
                     FROM reports r
                     {$whereClause}
                     GROUP BY DATE(r.created_at)
                     ORDER BY report_date ASC";

        $trendStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($trendSql);
        $trendStmt->execute($params);
        $trend = $trendStmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'report_type' => 'summary',
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
            'summary' => $summary,
            'daily_trend' => $trend,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Category breakdown report.
     */
    private function generateCategoryBreakdownReport(array $filters): array
    {
        [$whereClause, $params] = $this->buildWhereClause($filters);

        $sql = "SELECT 
                    r.category,
                    COUNT(*) AS record_count,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                    COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity,
                    MIN(r.created_at) AS earliest_record,
                    MAX(r.created_at) AS latest_record
                FROM reports r
                {$whereClause}
                GROUP BY r.category
                ORDER BY total_amount DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute($params);
        $breakdown = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Calculate percentages
        $grandTotal = array_sum(array_column($breakdown, 'total_amount'));
        foreach ($breakdown as &$row) {
            $row['percentage'] = $grandTotal > 0
                ? round(($row['total_amount'] / $grandTotal) * 100, 2)
                : 0;
        }
        unset($row);

        return [
            'report_type' => 'category_breakdown',
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
            'grand_total_amount' => $grandTotal,
            'data' => $breakdown,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Status breakdown report.
     */
    private function generateStatusBreakdownReport(array $filters): array
    {
        [$whereClause, $params] = $this->buildWhereClause($filters);

        $sql = "SELECT 
                    r.status,
                    COUNT(*) AS record_count,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                    COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
                    COALESCE(SUM(r.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity,
                    MIN(r.created_at) AS earliest_record,
                    MAX(r.created_at) AS latest_record
                FROM reports r
                {$whereClause}
                GROUP BY r.status
                ORDER BY record_count DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute($params);
        $breakdown = $stmt->fetchAll();

        $grandTotalRecords = array_sum(array_column($breakdown, 'record_count'));
        foreach ($breakdown as &$row) {
            $row['percentage'] = $grandTotalRecords > 0
                ? round(($row['record_count'] / $grandTotalRecords) * 100, 2)
                : 0;
        }
        unset($row);

        return [
            'report_type' => 'status_breakdown',
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
            'grand_total_records' => $grandTotalRecords,
            'data' => $breakdown,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Get available filter options for the dashboard UI.
     */
    public function getFilterOptions(): array
    {
        $statusStmt = $this->pdo->query("SELECT DISTINCT status FROM reports ORDER BY status ASC");
        $statuses = $statusStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);

        $categoryStmt = $this->pdo->query("SELECT DISTINCT category FROM reports ORDER BY category ASC");
        $categories = $categoryStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);

        $dateRangeStmt = $this->pdo->query("SELECT MIN(created_at) AS min_date, MAX(created_at) AS max_date FROM reports");
